openingQuery: Is the Pellier shirt at the Brooklyn warehouse?

chat.content: Is the Pellier shirt at the Brooklyn warehouse?

Yes — Brooklyn (BK-01) has 8 of the Pellier Linen Shirt in ecru on the floor right now. Also 4 at Austin (ATX-02) and 12 at Portland (PDX-01). Ship window from Brooklyn to your zip is 1–2 business days.

toolCalls.description: Warehouse-level stock lookup for Pellier Linen Shirt
toolCalls.sql: SELECT warehouse_id, warehouse_name, quantity, restock_eta FROM inventory_by_warehouse WHERE product_id = $1 AND quantity > 0 ORDER BY warehouse_id;
toolCalls.resultSummary: 3 warehouses, 24 total units, Brooklyn leads with 8

confidence.reasoning: Deterministic warehouse lookup. Haiku 4.5 at 0.0 — zero variance. The tool participants just wrote, running in 142ms.

memoryPills.content: Pellier shirt confirmed at Brooklyn warehouse (8 units)

sections.title: The checkpoint
paragraphs: Same question, different answer. Participants wired floor_check; the Dispatcher routed Turn 4 straight to Stock Keeper; Haiku 4.5 at 0.0 returned the warehouse breakdown in 184ms.
The code behind this response is yours. The tool you wrote just shipped a real answer to a real question — and nothing about the Boutique changed. That's the whole lesson: capability is composable.
